body_excerpt: In Gs101Pipeline::Update of gs101_displaycolor_pipeline.cc, there is a possible device reboot when watching a video due to improper input validation. This could lead to remote denial of service with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
